film.title: Bahu Begum
film.overview: On the day of her marriage, the bride goes missing. She ends up in a brothel, compelling her wealthy husband to pretend that all is well to keep the family's honor intact.

dialogues.dialogue: There mustn't be a cheat like you in all of Lucknow. And there mustn't be a beauty like you in the whole universe. You should feel ashamed of yourself, this was a very cheap act. Danger bells are ringing, the old woman is recovering. Push a cloth into her mouth and blindfold her.

Are you Zeenat, Sultan's daughter, the wife of Nawab Sikander? The daughter and daughter-in-law. . . of such reputed families cannot be so ill-fated and shameless. I feel pity for you. Come, I'll see you off. Leave my hand, I'll go myself. - It's a dark night, don't go alone.

Yes, Zeenat. Are you the same Zeenat whom I wanted to give a life of love and respect? Are you the Zeenat before whom I was proud to bow down in love? And today, you had to come from the w***e house in the cloak of darkness? Yes, I'm that very Zeenat.
